name: Gazpacho De Madrid
recipeIngredient: 1 medium Green bell pepper, (crusts trimmed) seeded and chopped
1 small Clove garlic, minced and coarsely chopped
1/4 cup Red wine vinegar, seeded and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine crumbled bread, tomatoes, cucumbers, onion, bell pepper, and garlic in a large bowl.
2. Stir in water, vinegar, and salt.
3. Puree the mixture in 2 batches in a blender on high speed for 1 minute.
4. Transfer to another bowl and whisk in olive oil and tomato paste.
5. Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate at least 2 hours or overnight.
6. Ladle soup into bowls, garnish with bread cubes, chopped onion, cucumber, and bell pepper, and serve. Makes 4 to 6 servings.
